nasb.text: “Now, O my God, I pray, let Your eyes be open and Your ears attentive to the prayer offered in this place.

esv.text: Now, O my God, let your eyes be open and your ears attentive to the prayer of this place.

cnv.text: “我的　神啊，現在求你張開眼睛，求你的耳朵垂聽在這地方獻上的禱告。

ccb.text: “我的上帝啊， 求你睁眼看、侧耳听在这殿里献上的祷告。
